mapper.select: SELECT prj.dev_prj_id , prj.dev_id , prj.inprj_yn , prj.st_dt , prj.ed_dt , CONCAT( IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(prj.st_dt, '%Y.%m'), ''), ' ~ ', IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(prj.ed_dt, '%Y.%m'), '') ) AS st_ed_dt , prj.cust_nm , prj.prj_nm , rate.rate_amt , prj.job_cd , fn_get_cm('job_cd', prj.job_cd) AS role_nm , prj.stack_txt , fn_get_cm_lst('skl_id', prj.stack_txt) AS stack_txt_nm , prj.alloc_pct , prj.remark , CASE WHEN COUNT(jt.code) = 0 THEN JSON_ARRAY() ELSE JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('code', jt.code, 'label', fn_get_cm('skl_id', jt.code))) END AS skl_id_lst FROM tb_dev_prj_info prj LEFT JOIN JSON_TABLE( CASE WHEN prj.stack_txt IS NULL OR TRIM(prj.stack_txt) = '' THEN '[]' WHEN JSON_VALID(prj.stack_txt) THEN prj.stack_txt ELSE CONCAT('["', REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(prj.stack_txt), ' ', ''), ',', '","'), '"]') END , '$[*]' COLUMNS ( code VARCHAR(30) PATH '$' ) ) jt ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN tb_dev_rate_info rate ON prj.dev_prj_id = rate.dev_prj_id AND prj.dev_id = rate.dev_id AND rate.rate_id = ( SELECT r2.rate_id FROM tb_dev_rate_info r2 WHERE r2.dev_prj_id = prj.dev_prj_id AND r2.dev_id = prj.dev_id AND r2.del_yn = 'N' AND r2.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY r2.rate_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE prj.dev_id = #{dev_id} AND prj.use_yn = 'Y' AND prj.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY prj.dev_prj_id ORDER BY prj.inprj_yn DESC, prj.st_dt DESC, prj.dev_prj_id DESC ;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dev_prj_info ( dev_id, st_dt, ed_dt, cust_nm, prj_nm, job_cd, stack_txt, alloc_pct, remark, inprj_yn, use_yn, del_yn, crt_ts, crt_by, upd_ts, upd_by ) VALUES ( #{dev_id}, NULLIF(#{st_dt}, ''), NULLIF(#{ed_dt}, ''), #{cust_nm}, #{prj_nm}, #{job_cd}, #{stack_txt}, #{alloc_pct}, #{remark}, #{inprj_yn}, 'Y', 'N', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dev_prj_info SET st_dt = #{st_dt}, ed_dt = #{ed_dt}, cust_nm = #{cust_nm}, prj_nm = #{prj_nm}, job_cd = #{job_cd}, stack_txt = #{stack_txt}, alloc_pct = #{alloc_pct}, remark = #{remark}, inprj_yn = #{inprj_yn}, upd_ts = NOW(), upd_by = #{userId} WHERE dev_prj_id = #{dev_prj_id}
mapper.select: SELECT rate_amt FROM tb_dev_rate_info WHERE dev_prj_id = #{dev_prj_id} AND dev_id = #{dev_id} AND del_yn = 'N' AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY rate_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dev_rate_info ( dev_prj_id, dev_id, rate_amt, remark, use_yn, del_yn, crt_ts, crt_by, upd_ts, upd_by ) VALUES ( #{dev_prj_id}, #{dev_id}, #{rate_amt}, #{remark}, 'Y', 'N', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT cd FROM tb_cd_mst WHERE grp_cd = #{grp_cd} AND grp_yn = 'N' AND del_yn = 'N' AND cd_nm = #{cd_nm} LIMIT 1

WITH prefixed AS ( SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(cd, '^[^0-9]+') AS prefix_part, CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cd, '[0-9]+$') AS UNSIGNED) AS num_val, LENGTH(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cd, '[0-9]+$')) AS num_len FROM tb_cd_mst WHERE grp_cd = #{grp_cd} AND grp_yn = 'N' AND del_yn = 'N' AND cd REGEXP '^[^0-9]+[0-9]+$' ),
numeric_only AS ( SELECT CAST(cd AS UNSIGNED) AS num_val, LENGTH(cd) AS num_len FROM tb_cd_mst WHERE grp_cd = #{grp_cd} AND grp_yn = 'N' AND del_yn = 'N' AND cd REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' )
SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT CONCAT(p.prefix_part, LPAD(p.num_val + 1, p.num_len, '0')) FROM prefixed p ORDER BY p.num_val DESC, p.num_len DESC LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT LPAD(MAX(n.num_val) + 1, MAX(n.num_len), '0') FROM numeric_only n ), '01' ) AS next_cd
